shell-proxy.description: Token-efficient shell proxy — wf_state, wf_git, wf_step_context, wf_files, wf_read, wf_env. Replaces bash reads with structured cached JSON. Use BEFORE any bash command.

flowctl-state.description: Workflow state tracker — flow_get_state, flow_advance_step, flow_request_approval, flow_add_blocker, flow_add_decision

graphify.description: Codebase knowledge graph — query_graph, get_node, get_neighbors, get_community, graph_stats. Rebuild: python3 -m graphify update .

gitnexus.description: Code intelligence engine — 16 MCP tools, git diff awareness
